fire_sacred.description: Fire is a sacred gift — letting it die is a transgression.
fire_sacred._comment: Forms when tribe builds first fire pit. Violated when fire expires.

share_food.description: The hungry must be fed — hoarding food is shameful.
share_food._comment: Forms when an agent drops berries (sharing). No specific violation check.

honor_the_dead.description: When a tribesman falls, the living must pause to remember.
honor_the_dead._comment: Forms after first tribal death. Reinforced by subsequent deaths.

divine_bounty.description: The god provides — give thanks through prayer when blessed.
divine_bounty._comment: Forms after a miracle. Encourages prayer behavior.
